2606.29929.title: HippoSpark: An On-Demand Experience System for LLM Reasoning
2606.29929.paper_summary: Distilling historical trajectories into reusable experience to enhance future problem-solving has become a focal point of recent LLM research. However, existing methods predominantly operate at the task level, leveraging general summaries or rules under the assumption that analogous tasks share universal solution patterns. This approach often fails in complex reasoning, which typically falters at local bottlenecks that require precise, state-specific guidance rather than broad heuristics. We introduce HippoSpark, a state-level experience system that performs on-demand retrieval tailored to the immediate needs of the current reasoning state. Across mathematical, scientific, and programming benchmarks, HippoSpark consistently outperforms both standard prompting and task-level experience baselines. Our findings reveal that the most effective experience systems are those that provide actionable guidance at critical bottlenecks rather than serving as generic task-level context. Our code is available at https://github.com/DanlingMeng/HippoSpark.
2606.29929.paper_summary_zh: 將歷史軌跡提煉成可重用的經驗，以增強未來的問題解決能力，已成為近期大型語言模型研究的焦點。<lb/>然而，現有的方法主要在任務層面運作，利用一般性摘要或規則，假設類似的任務共享普遍的解決模式。<lb/>這種方法在複雜推理中往往失敗，因為這類推理通常在需要精確、特定狀態指導的局部瓶頸處受阻，而不是依賴廣泛的啟發式方法。<lb/>我們介紹了HippoSpark，一個狀態級經驗系統，能根據當前推理狀態的即時需求進行按需檢索。<lb/>在數學、科學和編程基準測試中，HippoSpark始終優於標準提示和任務層面經驗基準。<lb/>我們的研究結果顯示，最有效的經驗系統是那些在關鍵瓶頸提供可行指導的系統，而不是作為一般性任務層面上下文。<lb/>我們的代碼可在 https://github.com/DanlingMeng/HippoSpark 獲得。
2606.29929.author: Jingyao Liu et.al.
2606.29929.authors: Jingyao Liu, Danling Meng, Chen Huang, Yukun Yan, Zhenghao Liu, Wenqiang Lei, See-Kiong Ng, Maosong Sun
